parameters.jsCode:
const input = $input.first().json; const payload = input.body && Object.keys(input.body).length ? input.body : input; return [ { json: { submissionId: payload.submissionId, title: payload.title || 'Devoir sans titre', subject: payload.subject || 'General', content: payload.content || '', fileUrl: payload.fileUrl || '', filePath: payload.filePath || '', submissionDate: payload.submissionDate || new Date().toISOString(), plagiarismPercentage: Number(payload.plagiarismPercentage || 0), studentId: payload.student?.id || null, studentName: payload.student?.name || 'Etudiant', studentEmail: payload.student?.email || 'student@example.com', className: payload.student?.className || '', teacherEmail: 'teacher@example.com', feedbackLanguage: payload.feedbackLanguage || payload.evaluationLanguage || 'fr', evaluationLanguage: payload.evaluationLanguage || payload.feedbackLanguage || 'fr', feedbackInstructions: payload.feedbackInstructions || 'Return all student-facing evaluation text in French. Use simple, clear, helpful French for a student.', confirmationSubject: `Devoir recu - ${payload.title || 'Devoir'}`, confirmationText: `Bonjour ${payload.student?.name || 'Etudiant'},\n\nVotre devoir \"${payload.title || 'Devoir'}\" a ete recu avec succes.\nMatiere : ${payload.subject || 'General'}\nID de soumission : ${payload.submissionId || ''}\n\nVotre devoir will now be analyzed automatically.`, confirmationHtml: `

Bonjour ${payload.student?.name || 'Etudiant'},

Votre devoir ${payload.title || 'Devoir'} a ete recu avec succes.

Matiere : ${payload.subject || 'General'}
ID de soumission : ${payload.submissionId || ''}

Votre devoir will now be analyzed automatically.

` } } ];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ submission_id: $json.submission_id, score: $json.score, feedback: $json.feedback, grammar_score: $json.grammar_score, structure_score: $json.structure_score, content_score: $json.content_score, ai_probability: $json.ai_probability, plagiarism_percentage: $json.plagiarism_percentage }) }}
